name: Basketball free throw
description: Indoor, good lighting — a clean example to start with.
intervalHintText: We suggest selecting from frame 3 to 29
calibrationHintText: We strongly recommend using the auto-calibration feature, and the diameter for the basketball is 0.24m.

name: Football throw
intervalHintText: We suggest selecting from frame 200 to 260
calibrationHintText: If u want to use auto-calibration, the diameter for the football is 0.22m. Else, if u want to use manual calibration, the length of the ruler in the video is 1 meter.

name: Football throw 2 (throw upwards)
intervalHintText: We suggest selecting from frame 0 to 30, which is the entire video
calibrationHintText: If u want to use auto-calibration, the diameter for the football is 0.22m. Else, if u want to use manual calibration, the length of the ruler in the video is 1 meter.
